General.Name: Neo-Neon Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Neo-Neon Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture and trading of lighting products in North America, Europe, the People's Republic of China, the rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates in two segments, PRC Lighting and USA Lighting. It offers lighting and decorative lights, as well as lighting solutions. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong. Neo-Neon Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Resuccess Investments Limited.
General.Address: 118 Connaught Road West, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
